name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America Greenfield, Indiana — Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans ($100-$1,000), and title loans ($2,000-$25,000)...
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency financing solutions. The company operates physical store locations across the United States, including the Jacksonville, FL branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave, and provides online lending options. Founded to serve consumers with immediate cash needs between paychecks, Advance America has built a multi-location network to provide accessible lending to underbanked populations.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (2-4 week terms up to $500 online or in-store), Installment Loans (up to $1,000 with multiple repayment periods), and Title Loans (up to $25,000 using vehicle equity as collateral, offered in partnership with LoanCenter). All products are available through both in-store visits and online applications, with same-day funding advertised for personal loans up to $1,000. The company also provides Western Union services at participating locations.

Advance America distinguishes itself through multi-channel accessibility (online and physical locations), bilingual support (Spanish-language services noted), extended store hours (9 AM-6 PM weekdays, 9 AM-4 PM Saturday), and high customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,456 reviews). The company emphasizes trained staff assistance and straightforward application processes requiring government ID, proof of income, checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN.

As an emergency-cash lender, Advance America serves consumers facing immediate financial gaps but operates in a sector characterized by high interest rates and fees typical of short-term lending. While convenient and fast, these products are designed for short-term needs rather than sustainable financial solutions. Borrowers should carefully review terms and consider whether repayment within 2-4 weeks or through installment plans aligns with their financial capacity.
pros: Same-day funding available for personal loans up to $1,000
Flexible product range from short-term payday loans to installment loans with longer repayment terms
High customer ratings (4.9/5 stars from 125,456 reviews) indicating consistent service quality
Extended store hours including Saturday service (9 AM-4 PM) and bilingual support (Spanish)
Title loans up to $25,000 for consumers with vehicle equity, offered online or in-store
Multiple application channels (online, in-store, phone pre-qualification)
Large installment loan amounts ($100-$1,000) relative to payday loan competitors
cons: Payday loans limited to $500, requiring repayment in 2-4 weeks, which may not address longer-term financial needs
Title loans use vehicle as collateral, creating risk of vehicle repossession if unable to repay
Website does not disclose APR, interest rates, or fees, making cost comparison difficult for consumers
Short repayment terms (2-4 weeks for payday loans) may create debt cycles for vulnerable borrowers
Installment loan maximum of $1,000 is modest for significant financial emergencies
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$500 immediately before their next paycheck with ability to repay in 2-4 weeks
Vehicle owners with good-condition cars and immediate capital needs up to $25,000
Borrowers preferring in-person service and staff guidance for loan selection
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers facing immediate, short-term cash shortfalls (typically 1-2 weeks) who cannot access traditional bank loans and have reliable income or vehicle collateral. The primary caveat is that payday and installment loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional credit, and the short repayment terms can create debt cycles; consumers should only use these products when alternative resources are exhausted and repayment is certain.
services: Payday Loans ($100-$500, 2-4 week terms, online or in-store)
Installment Loans ($100-$1,000, multiple payment periods, online or in-store)
Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000, vehicle collateral, online or in-store)
In-store loan applications with trained staff assistance

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
